ValidationRule.description: 「受注見込_単計(損予)時点」が2,3の場合、単計(損予)織込_CPは必須です
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( PriceList__c = false, OR( ISPICKVAL(ExpectedOrderSingleCount__c, '2'), ISPICKVAL(ExpectedOrderSingleCount__c, '3') ), OR( ISBLANK(SingleTotalCP__c), SingleTotalCP__c = 0 ), NOT(Creating__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 単計(損予)織込_CPは必須です
